{{Quote|The eighteenth course is about to be served. Blood chowder with a loop pastry crust. Seeing blood spilled always makes me hungry!|Drooga|<ref name="Star Wars: The Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Blood chowder''' was a healthy meal favored by [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Nampi]]. It was made of [[soypro]] cooked in purified animal blood.

{{Food-stub}}
